text: Fun fact, my first experience with FP was using XSLT. This is how I discovered lisp, which crowd seemed to be of the opinion that XML was better when it was encoded as s-expressions. I’ve since learned Clojure and agree with the parenthesists. The graffiti of taggers makes parenthitis seem like a mild affliction. Now there is a certain syntactical meta-circular aesthetic to XML all the way down. However the best part of XSLT is XPath and that’s not even XML syntax. Even the most devoted double paired angle bracket double namers knew they had stop somewhere.
